title: The Complete Star Wars Trilogy Scrapbook
content:
{{Top|rwm|ref|reb|italics=1}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:Complete_Scrapbook_1.jpg]] |title=''The Complete Star Wars
Trilogy Scrapbook'' |author=[[Mark Cotta Vaz]] |cover artist=[[Todd Lefelt]] {{C|Book design}} |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |release date=[[February]] [[1997]]''[[The Complete Star Wars Trilogy Scrapbook]]'', [[Scholastic]] [[1997]] first edition |type=*Hardcover *Paperback |pages=64 |dimensions= |weight= |isbn=0590066536 |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''The Complete Star Wars Trilogy Scrapbook''''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] reference book based on the ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[original trilogy]]. It was written by [[Mark Cotta Vaz]] and published by [[Scholastic]] in [[February]] [[1997]]. A reissue edition was published in [[2004]]. {{Book-stub}} ==Publisher's summary== ''An Out of This World Guide to Star Wars, The Empire Strikes Back, and Return of the Jedi.'' ==Contents== ===The Civil War=== ====The Empire==== *'''Imperial Leaders''' *[[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] *[[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Imperial Royal Guard]] *Grand Moff [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] *[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] *'''Fighting Ships and Stormtroopers''' *[[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] *[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]] *[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] *[[Cold assault stormtrooper|Snowtroopers]] *'''Arsenal of Destruction''' *[[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] *The Second Death Star ([[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]]) *Death Star Shield Generator Bunker *Imperial Walkers ([[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]]) ([[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]]) ====Rebel Alliance==== '''Rebel Leaders and Heroes''' *[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] *[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] *[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] *[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] *[[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] *[[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] *[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] *[[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] *[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] *[[Nien Nunb/Legends|Nien Nunb]] *[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] *[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] *'''Fighting Ships''' *[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]] *Han Solo's Blaster and Holster *'''Rebel Bases''' *Yavin Base *[[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] *Main Rebel Briefing Room ===Secrets of the Force=== ====The Light Side==== *'''Jedi Justice''' *Ben (Obi-Wan) Kenobi *[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] *[[Lightsaber/Legends|Lightsabers]] *'''Jedi Philosophy''' *'''Jedi Training''' ===The Dark Side=== *'''Evil Power''' *[[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] *[[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Vader]] *'''The Underworld''' *[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] *[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] '''Knights of Darkness''' *The Helmet of Darth Vader ===Wonders of the Galaxy=== ====Planets and Places==== *[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] *[[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba the Hutt's Palace]] *[[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] *Ewok Village ([[Endor/Legends|Sanctuary Moon of Endor]]) ===Alien Life=== *[[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] *[[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]] *[[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]] *[[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] *Cantina Characters ====Jabba's Palace==== *[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] *[[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]] *[[Salacious B. Crumb/Legends|Salacious Crumb]] ====Creatures==== *[[Dewback/Legends|Dewback]] *[[Bantha/Legends|Bantha]] *[[Rancor/Legends|Rancors]] *[[Tauntaun/Legends|Tauntaun]] *[[Wampa/Legends|Wampa]] (Ice Cave) *[[Sarlacc/Legends|Sarlacc]] ====Droids==== *[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] *[[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] *[[Probe droid/Legends|Probe Droid]] *Medical Droid *[[IG-88 assassin droid/Legends|IG-88 assassin droid]] ===Famous Battles=== *[[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] *[[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] *[[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] *The Final Battle: Luke Skywalker vs. Darth Vader *Luke Defeats Darth Vader ==Media== ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|0590066536}}; [[February]] [[1997]]; [[Scholastic]]; US paperback *{{ISBN|0749730900}}; [[March 13]], 1997; [[Reed Books, Children's Publishing]]; UK paperback''[[The Complete Star Wars Trilogy Scrapbook]]'', [[Reed Books, Children's Publishing]] edition *{{ISBN|061313401X}}, [[October 1|October]] [[2001]], [[Bt Bound]], Library Binding *{{ISBN|0439681308}}; [[October]] [[2004]]; Scholastic Inc.; US paperback, reissue ===Cover gallery=== File:Complete_Scrapbook_1.jpg|Scholastic, 1997 File:Complete_Scrapbook_2.jpg|Scholastic reissue, 2004 ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|32|Lucasfilm's Latest}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Star Wars Trilogy Scrapbook|Complete Star Wars Trilogy Scrapbook]]
